label: The Nullglow Alcove
description: The Nullglow Alcove is a compact sleeping chamber set behind the prismatic laminates of The Polarized Cask, insulated from concourse vibration by sound-damping ribs. Its walls are clad in matte black-ceramic panels that swallow stray reflections, leaving only thin, regulated bands of copper-white twilight from a polarized slit above the berth. A recessed locker bank of vitrified glass is etched with charge-channel filaments that mirror the debris-belt arcs, serving as both storage and passive field shielding. Air-handling grilles maintain the tavern’s characteristic hush, and the floor plate is sprung to quiet footfall within the pressurized shell.
